source: South African public clinical guidelines — GEMS MAS quick-reference
note: All links point to publicly available regulatory and clinical reference documents. No personal data. For internal GEMS MAS reference use only.

guidelines.title: Prescribed Minimum Benefits — PMB Conditions
guidelines.description: Full PMB condition list — Medical Schemes Act, 1998 (Act No. 131 of 1998), Annexure A.

guidelines.title: Chronic Disease List (CDL) — Chronic Benefits
guidelines.description: Official 26-condition Chronic Disease List with ICD-10 codes and DSP requirements.

guidelines.title: CMS Circular 47 of 2022 — PMB Coded List & DTP Algorithms
guidelines.description: Defines Algorithm A, B, and C for determining PMB funding obligations at DSP and non-DSP providers.

guidelines.title: GEMS Benefit Options Fact Sheet
guidelines.description: Official GEMS benefit option summary — Tanzanite One, Beryl, Ruby, Emerald Value, Emerald, Onyx. Tier structure, network dependency, employer subsidy.

guidelines.title: GEMS Designated Service Provider Network
guidelines.description: DSP provider search — required for Tanzanite One, Beryl, and Emerald Value network-dependent options.

guidelines.title: WHO ICD-10 Online Browser (Version 2019)
guidelines.description: World Health Organization ICD-10 code browser — authoritative source for all diagnosis codes.

guidelines.title: Standard Treatment Guidelines and Essential Medicines List
guidelines.description: Standard Treatment Guidelines and Essential Medicines List for primary, hospital, and chronic care levels.
guidelines.source: National Department of Health Knowledge Hub

guidelines.title: SEMDSA Guidelines for the Diagnosis and Management of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus
guidelines.description: South African clinical practice guidelines for Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (ICD-10: E11) — diagnosis, targets, and medication protocols. Published in Journal of Endocrinology, Metabolism and Diabetes of South Africa.
guidelines.source: Society for Endocrinology, Metabolism and Diabetes of South Africa (SEMDSA)

guidelines.title: South African Hypertension Practice Guidelines
guidelines.description: Clinical guidelines for the diagnosis and management of hypertension (ICD-10: I10) in the South African context.

guidelines.title: Guidelines for the Management of Asthma in Adults (2021)
guidelines.description: South African Thoracic Society 2021 position statement on the management of asthma (ICD-10: J45) — stepwise management and monitoring.
guidelines.source: South African Thoracic Society via Pulmonology journal

guidelines.title: South African Journal of Psychiatry — Practice Guidelines
guidelines.description: Psychiatric management guidelines covering depression (F32), bipolar disorder (F31), and schizophrenia (F20) — CDL-relevant codes.

guidelines.title: NIMART Online Course — HIV and ARV Management
guidelines.description: Nurse Initiated and Managed Antiretroviral Therapy guidelines for HIV (ICD-10: B24) — clinical management and monitoring.

guidelines.title: ICON Chemotherapy Standards and Guidelines
guidelines.description: Oncology treatment guidelines relevant to PMB oncology benefits — chemotherapy, radiation, supportive care protocols.

guidelines.title: Maternal Care Guidelines — Complete Maternal Book
guidelines.description: South African maternity care protocols covering antenatal, intrapartum, and postnatal PMB benefits.
guidelines.source: National Department of Health Knowledge Hub

guidelines.title: Emergency Medicine Practice Guidelines — EMSSA
guidelines.description: Emergency Medicine Society of South Africa practice guidelines — relevant to Algorithm B PMB emergency funding obligations.
guidelines.source: Emergency Medicine Society of South Africa (EMSSA)
